# Audit: <feature-id>

- Status: in-progress | complete
- Last Updated: YYYY-MM-DD

## 1. Scope And Basis

- target scope
- active rules or standards applied
- inspected evidence

## 2. Grounded Report

- observed facts, findings, or `no findings`

## 3. Follow-Up Or Residual Risks

- follow-up item, risk, or `none`

## 4. Confidence

- high | medium | low
- short reason
